name: inflight
description: Design feedback plugin for AI coding agents — share work for review, collect structured feedback, and implement changes.

interface.shortDescription: Share work for design review, collect feedback, and implement changes
interface.longDescription: Use Inflight to share staging deployments for design review, collect structured feedback (element pins, polls, vibe checks, recordings), and implement changes from your coding agent.
defaultPrompt: Implement the feedback from my team
